mapper.select: SELECT id, content, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, answer FROM questions ORDER BY id
SELECT id, content, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, answer FROM questions WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, content, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, answer FROM questions ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{count}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO questions(content, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, answer) VALUES(#{content}, #{optionA}, #{optionB}, #{optionC}, #{optionD}, #{answer})
